message:
fix(build): resolve workspace compile errors blocking all-targets check

- proptest_wire_protocol.rs: fix prop_assert_eq! implicit format capture
  ({attempt} → explicit arg) — macro doesn't support Rust 2021+ captures
- search_integration.rs: replace unresolved `frankenterm_core::test_utils`
  import with placeholder (module doesn't exist yet)
- frankenterm/Cargo.toml: add `semantic-search` feature passthrough to
  binary crate (was causing unexpected_cfgs warning in main.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
